name: gohire/mcp-for-wordpress
description: WordPress plugin that turns a self-hosted WordPress site into an OAuth 2.1-protected remote MCP server for Claude Desktop.

build:zip: @php -r "$zip = new ZipArchive(); $zip->open('mcp-for-wordpress.zip', ZipArchive::CREATE | ZipArchive::OVERWRITE); $files = new RecursiveIteratorIterator(new RecursiveDirectoryIterator('.', RecursiveDirectoryIterator::SKIP_DOTS)); foreach ($files as $file) { if (str_starts_with($file->getPathname(), './.git') || str_starts_with($file->getPathname(), './tests') || str_starts_with($file->getPathname(), './node_modules')) continue; $zip->addFile($file->getPathname(), 'mcp-for-wordpress/' . substr($file->getPathname(), 2)); } $zip->close();"
